title: TOSY Magnet Fidget Spinner Mini - 8 blocks, 3 in 1 Toy: Transformable Fidget Spinner, Infinity Cube, 2x2 Puzzle Cube, Christmas Stocking Stuffers Gift for Kids/Adults, STEM Sensory Stress Relief Toy
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: TRANSFORMABLE FIDGET SPINNER - Featuring 72 magnets (eight embedded in each block), the TOSY Magnet Fidget Spinner Mini lets you create various fidget spinner shapes. Rotation is smooth with a stainless steel bearing, making it spin longer than others

MAGNET PUZZLE CUBE 2X2 - You can easily turn the Fidget Spinner Mini into a 2x2x2 magnet puzzle cube, which can be rotated and rearranged in any way, allowing you to explore the cube inside out, and improve your puzzle solving skills

MAGNETIC BUILDING BLOCKS - You can create over 100 different shapes from the eight cubes included. Collect more to build more. Durable plastic and smooth surface ensures safety and comfort for both kids 6+ and adults

CUSTOMIZABLE INFINITY CUBE - You can also create your own Infinity Cube in various shapes and sizes using the magnetic blocks. Flip and fold smoothly and effortlessly to relieve stress and anxiety, focus better, and increase dexterity

PERFECT GIFT - This STEAM accredited sensory toy helps improve creativity, logical thinking, and hand-eye coordination, and makes an excellent gift for friends and families for many occasions (Birthdays, Valentine, Christmas, Easter, Graduation)
